summary: Cyber Warriors feature testing complete. All backend APIs working (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright UI tests.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cyber-warriors/events returns 200 with list
Backend: POST /api/cyber-warriors/events creates event correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/cyber-warriors/events/{id} deletes event
Backend: POST /api/cyber-warriors/register creates individual registration
Backend: POST /api/cyber-warriors/register creates organization registration
Backend: All organization types work (school, college, corporate, ngo, other)
Backend: GET /api/cyber-warriors/registrations returns list
Backend: DELETE /api/cyber-warriors/registrations/{id} works
Backend: Validation rejects missing required fields (422)
Backend: Validation rejects short event description (422)
Frontend: Homepage Cyber Warriors section renders with dark theme (#0a0a0a)
Frontend: Section shows stats (500+ Sessions, 10K+ Trained, 50+ Partners)
Frontend: Feature cards display (Fraud Prevention, Certification, Community Training, Expert Led)
Frontend: 'Join the Mission' button navigates to /cyber-warriors
Frontend: /cyber-warriors hero section displays CYBER WARRIORS title
Frontend: Initiative badge 'An Initiative by ETI Educom' visible
Frontend: Registration form toggle between Individual/Organization works
Frontend: Organization form shows extra fields (org type, org name) when toggled
Frontend: Individual form hides organization fields correctly
Frontend: Form submission via POST /api/cyber-warriors/register works
Frontend: Success toast appears after form submission
Frontend: Past Events section loads events from API
Frontend: Event card click opens modal with details
critical_code_review_comments: Dark theme implementation looks professional with #0a0a0a background and gradient orbs
Glassmorphism cards with backdrop-blur effect well implemented
Form toggle between Individual/Organization works seamlessly with proper field visibility
All data-testid attributes properly added for testing
API integration properly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from environment
Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby warning in console (accessibility improvement)
Event modal displays all event details correctly with proper date formatting
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed events and registrations during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cyber Warriors feature fully tested. Homepage section with dark theme renders correctly. Landing page at /cyber-warriors has working registration form with Individual/Organization toggle. Events load from /api/cyber-warriors/events and display in modal on click. All APIs tested and passing.

homepage_cyber_warriors_section: Feature cards: Fraud Prevention, Certification, Community Training, Expert Led
cyber_warriors_landing_page: Hero section with CYBER WARRIORS title
Features section (Threat Awareness, Digital Safety, Community Shield, Scam Detection)
registration_form: Individual fields: name, phone, email, date, message
Organization fields: org type dropdown, contact name, org name, phone, email, date, message
past_events_section: Event cards with image, title, description
